context_summary: BuildContext returned case CASE_001 for object seller/SELLER_001 triggered by ALERT_001 (rule: seller_late_delivery_spike, severity: high, metric: late_delivery_rate, current: 0.31, baseline: 0.08, delta: +287.5%). Root object properties include seller_state, seller_city, gmv, order_count, avg_review_score, late_delivery_rate. Metrics available: seller_late_delivery_rate_7d (0.31 vs 0.08 baseline), seller_order_count_7d (45 vs 52 baseline), seller_avg_review_score_7d (3.2 vs 4.1 baseline), seller_gmv_7d (12500 vs 14800 baseline). Linked objects: recent_orders (up to 10, fields: order_id, order_status, payment_value, review_score, delivery_status). Allowed actions: notify_owner, create_followup_task, export_report. Governance: role=agent_readonly, redact_pii=true, classification=open.

expected_decision.summary: Seller SELLER_001 exhibits a significant late delivery rate of 31% (baseline 8%, delta +23pp), indicating a systemic fulfillment issue. Order volume is slightly declining and review scores are dropping. Immediate seller operations intervention is required to prevent further impact on customer experience and platform reputation.
rationale: Seller SELLER_001 late_delivery_rate_7d is 0.31, far exceeding the recipe threshold for high-severity escalation (baseline 0.08), a 287.5% relative increase and 23 percentage point absolute delta.
Seller order count is declining (45 vs 52 baseline), and average review score has dropped from 4.1 to 3.2, suggesting deteriorating service quality affecting customer satisfaction.
The late delivery rate at 31% indicates a systemic fulfillment problem beyond normal variance — likely root causes include logistics capacity, inventory management, or carrier issues.
Recent orders (available via link:recent_orders) provide order-level delivery status and review patterns that corroborate the aggregate metric signal.

payload.message: Seller SELLER_001 late delivery rate at 31% (baseline 8%) — immediate intervention required.

payload.title: Investigate and resolve late delivery issue for SELLER_001
payload.description: Follow up on seller SELLER_001 late delivery rate spike (31% vs 8% baseline). Review recent orders, contact seller, identify root cause (logistics/inventory/carrier), and implement corrective actions with 7-day remediation plan.
